texto: The Legend of the Firefish,first in the Trophy Chase Trilogy by George Bryan Polivka, is a winner....filled with action,adventure, danger, intrigue,surprise,suspense....The characters Polivka created are fresh and interesting....A must read for fantasy lovers, and a highly recommended drating for others who want a good story. Rebecca LuElla Miller A Christian Worldview of Fiction Website
explicacao: Orientação direta de George Bryan Polivka sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The Legend of the Firefish,first in the Trophy Chase Trilogy by George Bryan Polivka, is a winner…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiration, love, útil em momentos de inspiracao e termino.
